blended.narrative: Edelweiss Valley is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.9 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,539 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Friday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
